title: chore(deps): update dependency typescript to v3.7.3
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [typescript](https://www.typescriptlang.org/) ([source](https://togithub.com/Microsoft/TypeScript)) | devDependencies | patch | [`3.7.2` -> `3.7.3`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/typescript/3.7.2/3.7.3) |
